tool_args.label: Subway OTP nearly 85% in March 2023

payload.claim_text: in March nearly 85% of subway trains arrived at their destinations on time, higher than any month in 2022 and higher even than March 2019
payload.subject: NYCT Subway

tool_args.label: Rider Safety Perception Surveys - 60% feel safe

payload.claim_text: more than 60% of riders now say they feel safe or very safe in the system, and that is up from 40% just a few months ago
payload.subject: NYCT Subway rider safety perception

tool_args.label: Transit prevents 20 million metric tons carbon emissions annually

payload.claim_text: Transit prevents more than 20 million metric tons of carbon emissions from being emitted into the air every year
payload.subject: MTA transit system

tool_args.label: R34211 Subway Car Contract details

payload.claim_text: The base R34211 contract is for the design, manufacturing, and delivery of 440 close-end cars (R211A), 20 open-gangway cars (R211T) for NYC Transit's 'B' Division, and 75 cars (R211S) for Staten Island Railway
payload.subject: R34211 Subway Car Contract

tool_args.label: $1.3B from NY State for Penn Station reconstruction

payload.claim_text: the agency already has a ton of money for the project from the State of New York that was allocated a couple of years ago -- $1.3 billion
payload.subject: Penn Station reconstruction

tool_args.label: Capital plan aims to repair 26.5 miles of elevated structures

payload.claim_text: The current capital plan aims to repair nearly half of all the elevated structures -- 26.5 miles, which is more than six times as much as the previous capital plan, and more than a billion dollars' worth of structural repair and paint projects already underway
payload.subject: MTA Capital Program

tool_args.label: MTA committed to making system 95% accessible

payload.claim_text: MTA's commitment to ADA has never been stronger, which is why the agency made the settlement and has committed its successors for a very long time to maintain the pace, in both construction and investment, to make the system 95% accessible
payload.subject: MTA ADA accessibility

tool_args.label: Laser Tribology lease for railhead cleaning - 700+ slip/slide events annually

payload.claim_text: Each year, the Agencies experience more than 700 slip/slide events, which typically occur from early October to late November when leaves fall from trees and deposit harmful residue on the rail
payload.subject: Metro-North and SIRTOA
